how to deep clean your bathroom step by step 💞🧽🫧 all steps are listed below 🫶🏼 1. gather all your products and tools to a basket 2. remove towels, bath mats, shampoo bottles and other items 3. dust from top to bottom: light fixtures, vents, surfaces, shelves 4. clean the shower screen 5. wipe walls, doors and mirrors 6. scrub shower fixtures 7. clean the sink and surfaces 8. disinfect light switches, door handles and other touch points 9. clean the toilet 10. clean the floor and grout - don’t forget the shower drain too, I cleaned mine recently so didn’t include it here 11. clean and disinfect your cloths, sponges and other tools @The Pink Stuff brand ambassador #cleantok #bathroomcleaning #cleaningtips #cleaningmotivation #deepclean

You’ve been using aluminum foil wrong this whole time 👀⚠️   Most people only use aluminum foil for leftovers… but it’s secretly one of the most underrated kitchen hacks in your house.   ✂️ Fold foil and cut through it to help sharpen dull scissors   📶 Place curved foil behind your router to help direct Wi-Fi signal where you need it most   🍳 Crumple it with water and scrub rusty pans or stuck-on grime without destroying the surface   👔 Put foil under your ironing board cover to reflect heat and iron faster   🧺 Toss foil balls in the dryer to reduce static without dryer sheets   ✨ Line a bowl with foil + baking soda + hot water to help remove tarnish from silver jewelry fast   These are the kind of simple home hacks nobody teaches anymore… but once you know them, you use them forever.   Save this before your next grocery run ✔️   Send it to someone obsessed with kitchen hacks 😂   Comment “FOIL” if you want the next hidden household hacks 👇   ——— aluminum foil hacks, kitchen hacks, household hacks, foil tricks, home cleaning hacks, aluminum foil uses, DIY home hacks, cleaning tips, smart kitchen tips, life hacks, rusty pan, rust, ironing, laundry static, WiFi signal, ironing clothes faster, cleaning jewelry  #aluminumfoil #kitchenhacks #homehacks #lifehacks #kitchentips
